title: Add Self-Repair System validation tooling
description: Follow-on to TASK-105 from Guidelines/MAP_repo_systems_gap_review.md: after the Self-Repair System docs/templates exist, add focused validation tooling and tests that check required repair templates and repair/health-report artifact structure without owning the prose system specification.
acceptance_criteria: Self-Repair validator checks the required template/artifact structure defined by TASK-105 without owning the prose system specification
Focused tests cover passing and failing repair record and health-check report cases
MAP_System/scripts/run_tests.sh includes the focused validator/test and the relevant validation commands pass
